classified_blocks.source_text_excerpt: The French Revolution was a period of radical social and political upheaval in France that lasted from 1789 until 1799.

classified_blocks.source_heading: Chapter 2 Socialism in Europe and the Russian Revolution
classified_blocks.source_text_excerpt: Socialism emerged as a response to industrialization, culminating in the Bolshevik takeover of Russia in 1917.

classified_blocks.source_heading: Chapter 3 Nazism and the Rise of Hitler
classified_blocks.source_text_excerpt: Adolf Hitler's rise to power in Germany marked a dark chapter where totalitarian control suppressed individual freedoms.

Power-sharing Federalism is a key concept in democratic governance, emphasizing the distribution of power among different levels of government.
Gender, religion, and caste are critical social factors influencing political participation and representation in democratic systems.
Political parties play a vital role in organizing elections and formulating policies within a democratic framework.
The outcomes of democracy include accountability, legitimacy, and the ability to address diverse societal needs effectively.

excluded_content: Chapter 1 The Story of Village Palampur is assessed as part of Periodic Assessment only.
Pastoralists in the Modern World is assessed as part of Periodic Assessment only.
The Age of Industrialisation is assessed as part of Periodic Assessment only.
Natural Vegetation and Wildlife map pointing (Class IX) - Only map pointing to be evaluated in annual examination.
Lifelines of National Economy map pointing (Class X) - Only map pointing to be evaluated in Board Examination.
teacher_notes: Interdisciplinary projects must be carried out at school between April and September. Carryover of project to home is strictly avoided.
Projects should use eco-friendly products without incurring too much expenditure.
Project records (internal assessment) should be kept for three months from the date of declaration of result for verification.
Map work: Maps available on Govt. of India website may be used.
Assessment includes self-assessment, peer assessment, and teacher assessment as per NEP-2020.
